items.summary: Implement a sticky header navigation bar with the Nimai Technologies Private Limited brand name/logo on the left and navigation links (Home, About, Services, Why Choose Us, Contact) on the right. Include a hamburger menu for mobile viewports. Apply glassmorphism styling with a corporate blue + deep indigo color palette.

Generate a hero background image: a futuristic tech-inspired dark blue/indigo abstract pattern with subtle glowing neural network nodes, grid lines, and geometric shapes suitable as a full-width section background.

Build a Hero section with: H1 headline 'Revolutionizing Institutional Intelligence with AI', a subheading 'Empowering Business Schools & Agencies with Smart Automation & Predictive Intelligence', a primary CTA button 'Request Institutional Demo' linking to the Contact section, a secondary CTA button 'Talk to Our AI Experts' linking to WhatsApp (https://wa.me/91XXXXXXXXXX?text=Hello%20Nimai%20Technologies%2C%20I%20would%20like%20to%20talk%20to%20your%20AI%20Experts.), and a subtle animated gradient or tech-inspired particle/grid background.

Build an About Us section with H2 title 'Bridging Traditional Pedagogy with Cutting-Edge AI'. Include descriptive paragraphs covering: domain expertise in education & institutional consulting, AI-driven transformation, secure data architecture, ethical AI compliance, and a vision statement about reducing administrative burden and maximizing student learning impact. Include 3 highlight cards labeled 'Innovation', 'Security', and 'Institutional Growth', each with a relevant icon and short description.

Build a Services section with H2 title 'Our Services'. Display 5 service cards, each with a title, short description, and a 'Learn More' or 'Get Started' CTA button that opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled message in the format: 'Hello Nimai Technologies, I am interested in [Service Name]. Please share more details.' The five services are: (1) Custom LLM Integration for Institutions, (2) Admission Automation & Smart Application Filtering, (3) Predictive Analytics for Student Success, (4) AI-powered Academic Intelligence Dashboard, (5) Data Security & Compliance Architecture. WhatsApp base URL: https://wa.me/91XXXXXXXXXX

Build a 'Why Choose Us' section with H2 title 'Why Choose Nimai Technologies'. Display 5 feature highlights as icon + title + short description cards: (1) Reduced Administrative Workload, (2) AI-Driven Decision Making, (3) Secure Infrastructure, (4) Future-Proof Technology, (5) Scalable Institutional Solutions.

Build a Contact section with H2 title 'Get In Touch'. Include a form with fields: Institution Name, Contact Person, Email, Phone, and Message. On form submission, instead of sending an email, construct a WhatsApp URL with all form field values auto-filled into a pre-formatted message and redirect the user to that WhatsApp link. WhatsApp base URL: https://wa.me/91XXXXXXXXXX. Also include a direct WhatsApp CTA button on the page.

Build a Footer with: Nimai Technologies Private Limited company name, Quick Links column (Home, About, Services, Why Choose Us, Contact), Services Links column listing all 5 services, a WhatsApp contact button, copyright notice, and links to Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions dummy pages. Create two stub pages (privacy-policy and terms-and-conditions) with placeholder legal text.

Implement full SEO setup across all pages: add a descriptive meta title ('Nimai Technologies | AI-Powered Institutional Intelligence Platform'), meta description targeting keywords (AI for Business Schools, Institutional AI Platform, Education AI Automation, AI Admission System, Academic Predictive Analytics), Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, og:image), Twitter Card meta tags, JSON-LD Organization schema markup, proper H1/H2/H3 heading hierarchy throughout, and a favicon. Generate a sitemap.xml and robots.txt in the public root.

Apply a cohesive visual design system: corporate blue (#1E3A8A range) and deep indigo (#312E81 / #4F46E5 range) gradient theme, glassmorphism cards (frosted glass effect with backdrop-filter), clean whitespace, smooth scroll behavior, subtle CSS entrance animations (fade-in / slide-up on scroll), hover lift animations on cards and buttons, professional sans-serif typography (e.g., Inter or similar), and consistent spacing throughout all sections.
